title: Latency 5+ self unproven circuit
code_blocks:
yosys -q -p "
  read_verilog top_mod.v
  rename top_mod top1
  proc
  memory
  flatten top1
  hierarchy -top top1
  read_verilog top_mod.v
  rename top_mod top2
  proc
  memory
  flatten top2
  equiv_make top1 top2 equiv
  hierarchy -top equiv
  clean -purge
  equiv_simple -short -undef
  equiv_induct
  equiv_status -assert
"
